response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, reported strong financial performance in the past year, with quarterly revenues of **$12.3M (Q1)**, **$14.1M (Q2)**, **$11.8M (Q3)**, and **$16.2M (Q4)**, totaling **$54.4M**—an **18% year-over-year growth**. The company currently employs **342 people**, reflecting its steady expansion and market presence.
